zh.lifeSummary: 當Arnulf VAN GAVERE於1210年出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫奧德納爾德馬特時，他的父親Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V49歲，母親Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele50歲。他於1248年9月16日之前與Margareta d'Herimez結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1270年享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Arnulf VAN GAVERE于1210年出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫奧德納爾德馬特时，他的父亲Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V49岁，母亲Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele50岁。他于1248年9月16日之前与Margareta d'Herimez结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1270年享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: VAN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: GAVERE

variants.name: Lariviere
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Normand, Fernand, Marcel, Adelard, Andre, Gaston, Philibert, Aime, Alcide, Alphonse, Antoine.
habitational name from any of numerous places in various parts of France named Larivière or La Rivière, from Old French riviere ‘river, shore’.

nameMeanings.name: Arnulf
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Arnulf VAN GAVERE was born in 1210, in Mater, Oudenaarde, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V, was 49 and his mother, Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele, was 50. He married Margareta d'Herimez before 16 September 1248. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1270, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Arnulf VAN GAVERE est né en 1210, à Mater, Audenarde, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele, avait 50 ans. Il a épousé Margareta d'Herimez avant 16 septembre 1248. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1270, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Arnulf VAN GAVERE 1210 in Mater, Oudenaarde, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V 49 und seine Mutter Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele 50. Er hat vor 16. September 1248 Margareta d'Herimez geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1270 im Alter von 60 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Arnulf VAN GAVERE è nato il nel 1210 nel Mater, Oudenaarde, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele, aveva 50 anni. Lui sposato Margareta d'Herimez prima del 16 settembre 1248. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1270, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Arnulf VAN GAVEREが1210年にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンオウデナアルドマターで生まれた時，父Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE Vは49歳，母Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzeleは50歳であった。1248年9月16日以前にMargareta d'Herimezと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1270年に60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Arnulf VAN GAVERE(이)가 1210년 벨기에 스트-블라아더 우데나아르드 마터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele(은)는 50세였다. 그는 1248년 9월 16일 이전 Margareta d'Herimez(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1270년 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Arnulf VAN GAVERE nasceu em 1210, em Mater, Oudenaarde, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele, tinha 50 anos. Ele casou-se com Margareta d'Herimez antes 16 de setembro de 1248. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1270, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Arnulf VAN GAVERE родился в 1210 г. в местности мэитир, оуденаард, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele, 50. Он женился на женщине по имени Margareta d'Herimez перед 16 сентябрь 1248 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1270 г. в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Arnulf VAN GAVERE nació en 1210, en Mater, Oudenaarde, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Rasse DE GAVRE DE LIEDKERKE V, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Claire D’Eksaerde van Herzele, tenía 50 años. Se casó con Margareta d'Herimez antes de 16 de septiembre de 1248. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1270, a la edad de 60 años.
